display.purpose: Hero headline and section titles. Classic high-contrast serif.

body.purpose: Paragraphs and UI. Never Inter. Cairo for Arabic/RTL.

script.purpose: One gilded flourish: hero sub-line, footer. Never body copy.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Product/branch card on hover, paired with translateY rise.

shadows.name: header-shrink
shadows.purpose: Sticky header once scrolled, with backdrop-blur.

motion.name: ease-brand
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for all transitions. No bounce/elastic.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Tap/press confirmation on every interactive element.

components.name: Primary Button (Gold)
components.description: The single gold CTA. Sharp 2px corners, uppercase tracking, lifts on hover.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action on dark ink surfaces. Translucent cream border, fills on hover.

components.name: Category Chip
components.description: QR-menu category quick-nav. Pill, white at rest, gold when active (scroll-spy).

components.name: WhatsApp Order Button
components.description: Direct WhatsApp order on the QR menu — pre-fills product, price, branch.

components.name: Ornament Divider
components.description: Signature gold emblem between two fading rules. Used instead of a section eyebrow.

narrative.overview: Xurcun is a premium Azerbaijani boutique for dried fruit, nuts, exotic teas, sweets and handcrafted gift boxes (Baku, est. 2015). The interface feels like the boutique: a cream-and-gold table presenting each product with care. Bilingual-first (AZ/RU/EN/TR/AR + RTL), mobile-first on the QR menu, alternating a light cream register with deep ink sections so the gold reads as luxury on both.
keyCharacteristics: Cream surface, gold accent, ink depth — three committed roles.
Classic serif display (Rufolo) with a clean humanist sans (Montserrat / Cairo).
Diamond emblem and 'Fond of Quality' slogan are fixed brand assets — never altered.
Restraint with confident brand moments: gold CTA, ornament divider, framed photo.

rules.name: The Gold-Dark Rule
rules.body: Small gold text on cream uses gold-dark #7E6228 (~4.5:1); bright gold #9D7C38 is for large/decorative type only.

rules.name: The On-Gold Rule
rules.body: Text on any gold fill uses on-gold #14110C (~4.8:1). Ink on gold is 3.65:1 and forbidden.

rules.name: The One-Flourish Rule
rules.body: Pinyon Script is a garnish: hero sub-line and menu footer only, never body copy.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; shadow and backdrop-blur are hover/scroll responses, never ambient decoration.

dos: Do keep the diamond emblem and 'Fond of Quality' slogan exactly as supplied — never recolored or re-set.
Do use gold-dark #7E6228 for small gold text and on-gold #14110C for text on gold fills.
Do pair Rufolo display with Montserrat body; swap to Amiri + Cairo for Arabic / RTL.
Do let real product/gift/store photography carry the design.
Do keep the page flat at rest; reserve shadow and blur for hover and the sticky header.
donts: Don't use Inter or the warm-neutral 'AI cream + Inter' look; the brand sans is Montserrat / Cairo.
Don't put ink text on a gold fill (3.65:1) — use on-gold.
Don't ship dark mode for public pages; dark is the admin panel only.
Don't place the tracked uppercase eyebrow above every section.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, bounce/elastic easing, or colored side-stripe borders.
